title: Nigeria committed to Marine Environment Protection
description: Director General, Nigerian Maritime Administration and Safety Agency (NIMASA), Dr Bashir Jamoh OFR (right) Secretary General, International Maritime Organization (IMO), His Excellency Kitack Lim short
html: Director General, Nigerian Maritime Administration and Safety Agency (NIMASA), Dr Bashir Jamoh OFR (right) Secretary General, International Maritime Organization (IMO), His Excellency Kitack Lim shortly after an MEPC, Marine Environment Protection Council meeting at IMO HQ in London.
